title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - New India Assurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
